response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions, but lacks direct commercial C++/Rust experience in routing/tiling pipelines. His background in distributed systems and GIS platforms (e.g., GISCollective) aligns partially with the role, though his recent work leans more toward TypeScript/AI tooling.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map, including event-driven geo-data platforms
Proven track record in distributed systems (e.g., Sociomantic, RIDE Capital) with low-latency and scalability focus
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership (workshops, talks, and tooling like Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with limited recent C++/Rust experience (critical for this role)
No explicit mention of routing/tiling pipelines or navigation systems in commercial projects
Recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) focus on full-stack/AI, diverging from geospatial data processing
